thread.title: Media Advisory - Minister Khera to announce tax break for all Canadians
thread.title_full: Media Advisory - Minister Khera to announce tax break for all Canadians

author: Employment and Social Development Canada
title: Media Advisory - Minister Khera to announce tax break for all Canadians
text:
GATINEAU , QC , Nov. 22, 2024 /CNW/ - The Minister of Diversity, Inclusion and Persons with Disabilities, the Honourable Kamal Khera, and the Minister of Small Business, the Honourable Rechie Valdez , will make an announcement about the new tax break that will put more money in the pockets of Canadians, so they can buy the things they need and save for the things they want.
A photo opportunity and media availability will follow the announcement.
Please note that all details are subject to change. All times are local.
Date:
Sunday, November 24, 2024
Time:
11:00 a.m. EST
Place:
Caledon, Ontario
To register, contact [email protected] with your name and media outlet before 10:00 a.m. EST on Sunday, November 24, 2024 . Event location details will be shared once media are registered.
Follow us on X (Twitter)
SOURCE Employment and Social Development Canada
For information (media only): Waleed Saleem, Press Secretary, Office of the Minister of Diversity, Inclusion and Persons with Disabilities, [email protected] ; Media Relations Office, Employment and Social Development Canada, 819-994-5559, [email protected]
